prompt: Please observe the elements in the photo and add meaningful hand-drawn annotations to each. [Visual Elements] iced americano, bread, window side, sunlight [Drawing Requirements] - Use thin white lines, like a hand-drawn pen - Single-line drawing style, lines should be casual, not too neat - Lightly trace the outline along the edges of objects - Appropriately add arrows/dashed lines to guide the eye [Text Style] - Chinese handwritten feel, more colloquial - Sentences should be short, as if written on the fly - Tone like daily chatter/small emotions [Small Decorations] - Can add a little bit: steam, small stars, hearts, simple emojis
